title: selaginella oregana
intro: Selaginella oregana, also known as Oregon spike moss, is a type of lycopodiophyte, a class of small, non-vascular plants that resemble mosses but belong to a distinct group. Traditionally, Selaginella oregana has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. Selaginella oregana can be prepared in various forms, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
